title: How Alex Hormozi ACTUALLY Uses AI
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down Alex Hormozi's approach to AI in business operations, presenting a 4-pillar system centered on data advantage, voice-first design, workflow decomposition, and compounding effects. The video highlights a common team mistake that required executive intervention to correct.
